results.alt: Leaders in Metal Folding Technology ARTITECT MACHINERY has been at the forefront of sheet metal fabrication equipment for over two decades. We design and manufacture a comprehensive range of double folding machines, metal folders, and sheet metal folding machines that serve industries from aerospace to architectural metalwork.
